description: Learn about how firmware analysis results are mapped to deployed devices and assets in Azure Device Registry.

Firmware analysis and Azure Device Registry operate as complementary Azure services. Firmware analysis evaluates the security of firmware images, while Azure Device Registry tracks deployed devices and assets and their associated metadata.
